Members with this prop have +10 skill damage.

This fan can only be attached to "ネリッサ・レイヴンクロフト", and each member can have any number of fans.

name: ラオーラ・パンテーラ

Reveal 2 members marked #ID1 from your deck and add them to your hand. Reshuffle the deck. Afterwards, if the number of cards in your shouting deck is 0, during this round, when your member labeled #ID1 knocks down the opponent's center member, the opponent's health points will be -1.
